fixture.description: New icon-only button component with no accessible name (svg is aria-hidden, no text, no aria-label).

grader.rubric: PASS if the report raises an accessibility finding that the icon-only <button> in src/components/IconButton.tsx has no accessible name (no text content and the svg is aria-hidden), recommending an aria-label or visible text, at IMPORTANT, DEBT, or SUGGESTED severity. FAIL if the missing accessible name is not flagged.

expected_behavior: A11y/i18n agent flags the icon-only button lacking an accessible name and suggests aria-label
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT invent unrelated CRITICAL findings
